description_long: This sports center consists of two main connected structures: a large, rectangular building with a wavy, undulating roof and a separate oval-shaped arena. The rectangular section features a prominent, irregular roof that appears to be supported by a series of vertical columns, with a mostly glass or transparent facade allowing visibility into the interior. The oval arena has a smooth, white exterior with transparent upper walls, revealing an interior sports court with markings and seating areas. The two structures are joined by a short, enclosed passageway. The overall design is modern, with clean lines and a focus on open, airy spaces. The materials suggest a combination of glass, metal, and concrete, with some plastic or composite elements for the roof and arena shell.
description: A modern sports center with a wavy-roofed rectangular building and an adjacent oval arena, connected by a short passage. The design features glass facades, visible interior courts, and a sleek, contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: From this view, the wavy roof of the rectangular building is prominent, with the oval arena visible behind it and the connecting passage in between.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of both the rectangular building and the oval arena, showing the supporting columns and transparent facade of the main structure.
description_view_2: The oval arena is seen head-on, with its transparent upper walls and interior court visible, while the rectangular building's end and roof are in the background.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side, with the oval arena's interior court and seating visible, and the wavy-roofed building to the right.
attribute_entrance_type: double doors, glass, centrally located on the rectangular building; secondary entrances likely on the arena but not clearly visible
attribute_roof_structure: Wavy, undulating roof on the rectangular building, likely metal or composite; oval arena has a smooth, slightly domed roof
attribute_window_arrangement: Large, continuous glass panels on the rectangular building's facade; oval arena features transparent upper walls with no distinct window pattern
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with modernist influences, characterized by clean lines, open glass facades, and innovative roof forms
